iOS / Swift Healthcare Objective-C

inpharmD

Led the modernization of a clinical drug information platform at Yanthraa Information Systems. Migrated core modules from Objective-C to Swift, integrated over 20 REST API endpoints, and developed dynamic UI components for real-time drug interaction data and clinical decision support.

The Challenge

The existing codebase was predominantly Objective-C, making it difficult to maintain and extend with modern iOS features. The app needed a strategic migration to Swift while continuing to deliver real-time drug information to healthcare professionals without any downtime or regression.

Key Contributions

  • Objective-C to Swift Migration: Systematically migrated core modules to modern Swift, improving code maintainability and enabling adoption of newer iOS frameworks.
  • REST API Integration: Integrated 20+ endpoints for drug information retrieval, interaction checking, dosage calculations, and clinical decision support.
  • Dynamic UI Components: Built real-time data-driven UI components that display drug interactions, adverse effects, and dosage guidelines with instant updates.
  • Critical Bug Resolution: Identified and resolved critical production bugs, significantly improving app stability and reducing crash rates.
  • UI/UX Enhancement: Redesigned key user flows for healthcare professionals, improving navigation and information density for clinical workflows.

Tech Stack

Swift

Primary language for new modules and migration

Objective-C

Legacy codebase maintenance and bridging

REST APIs

20+ endpoints for real-time drug data

UIKit

Dynamic and data-driven UI components

Core Data

Offline caching of drug information

XCTest

Unit and integration testing
